questions.question: What is the definition of society according to the lesson?
questions.correct_answer: A group of people united by a common information field.

questions.question: What is law as defined in this lesson?
questions.correct_answer: A formal prohibition on the use of violence against a person.

questions.question: What three things does violence take away from a person?
questions.correct_answer: Freedom (the right to choose), rights (the ability to act), and property (the results of labor).

questions.question: What is the difference between defense and violence according to the lesson?
questions.correct_answer: Violence is prohibited force against a person, while defense is the application of force against violence, which is allowed.

questions.question: What are the four levels of development that humanity passes through, and what defines 'our people' at each level?
questions.correct_answer: Level 1 (Family) - only family members; Level 2 (Clan/tribe) - the whole tribe; Level 3 (People/nation) - those who share language and culture; Level 4 (Civil society) - any person who has renounced violence.
